Example Request

curl -X PATCH 'https://api.twitch.tv/helix/eventsub/conduits/shards' \
-H 'Authorization: Bearer cfabdegwdoklmawdzdo98xt2fo512y' \
-H 'Client-Id: uo6dggojyb8d6soh92zknwmi5ej1q2' \
-H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
-d '{
  "conduit_id":"bfcfc993-26b1-b876-44d9-afe75a379dac",
  "shards": [{
    "id": "0",
    "transport": {
        "method": "webhook",
        "callback": "https://this-is-a-callback.com",
        "secret": "s3cre7"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "1",
    "transport": {
        "method": "webhook",
        "callback": "https://this-is-a-callback-2.com",
        "secret": "s3cre7"
    }
  },
  {
    "id": "3",
    "transport":{
        "method": "webhook",
        "callback": "https://this-is-a-callback-3.com",
        "secret": "s3cre7"
    }
  }]
}'

Example Response

{
  "data": [
    {
      "id": "0",
      "status": "enabled",
      "transport": {
        "method": "webhook",
        "callback": "https://this-is-a-callback.com"
      }
    },
    {
      "id": "1",
      "status": "webhook_callback_verification_pending",
      "transport": {
        "method": "webhook",
        "callback": "https://this-is-a-callback-2.com"
      }
    }
  ],
  "errors": [
    {
      "id": "3",
      "message": "The shard id is outside the conduit's range",
      "code": "invalid_parameter"
    }
  ]
}
